title: noccaea atlantica
intro: Noccaea atlantica, also known as the Atlantic penny-cress, is a perennial plant species within the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in relieving respiratory issues and reducing inflammation, due to its high content of glucosinolates. The health benefits of Noccaea atlantica include its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, which may aid in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Noccaea atlantica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
